metadata.description: Open-source Claude Code plugin — 29 token-efficient MCP tools, GitHub OAuth sign-in, auto-genome from public repos, cloud-genome pull, per-session accounting, animated status line. MIT, zero telemetry.

plugins.name: ashlr
plugins.description: Token-efficient file tools for Claude Code — open-source WOZCODE alternative. Mean −79.5% savings on files ≥ 2 KB.
